title: Manufacturing Engineer - Haier India Holdings Services - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Haier India Holdings Services - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
We at Haier India Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Haier India Holdings Services:
Haier India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haier India Holdings Services!
